'''âh-d-r-zh''' ('''kahadrezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmoregulate|osmoregulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmoregulate|osmoregulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-d-r-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kahadrezhoko
|}
